omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "1.5 Certification of Competency (ISV Critical Care Physician)" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: Acknowledgement_Date
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Acknowledgement Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: Additional_certification_required
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "*Additional certification required", "text" : "*Additional certification required", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Advanced_Management_of_Critical_Illness
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "^These include but are not restricted to: providing admission or consultative services for critically ill patients; management of ethical, regulatory or legal issues related to critically ill patients; management of complex airway emergencies, coronary ischemia, arrhythmia and cardiogenic shock, gastrointestinal hemorrhage and shock, sepsis and septic shock, cerebral ischemia, cerebral infection, seizure, and post-resucitative injury, complex nutritional dilemmas and malnutrition, respiratory failure and severe lung disease, renal failure, electrolyte and metabolic emergencies, complex resuscitation interventions and shock, multi-system trauma and surgical illness", "text" : "^These include but are not restricted to: providing admission or consultative services for critically ill patients; management of ethical, regulatory or legal issues related to critically ill patients; management of complex airway emergencies, coronary ischemia, arrhythmia and cardiogenic shock, gastrointestinal hemorrhage and shock, sepsis and septic shock, cerebral ischemia, cerebral infection, seizure, and post-resucitative injury, complex nutritional dilemmas and malnutrition, respiratory failure and severe lung disease, renal failure, electrolyte and metabolic emergencies, complex resuscitation interventions and shock, multi-system trauma and surgical illness", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Bedside_percutaneous_tracheostomy
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Bedside percutaneous tracheostomy*", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "C", "developerName" : "C", "value" : "C", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Critical_Care_Management_Declaration
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "I am capable of managing medical conditions and performing procedures typically encountered in the practice of Critical Care Medicine, with the appropriate critical care training and certification to include the co-management of patients for medical and surgical disorders.", "text" : "I am capable of managing medical conditions and performing procedures typically encountered in the practice of Critical Care Medicine, with the appropriate critical care training and certification to include the co-management of patients for medical and surgical disorders.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }
